title: Senior Plant Manager at Supreme Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Supreme Industries
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!
